The '''Republic Starship''' was a model of [[air cruiser]] employed by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the early [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The ship was armed with a single [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] or artillery cannon. The cannon served as stopping power for battalions of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] or [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]].

==History==
The air cruiser was used most notably in the [[Hunt for the Decimator]] campaign under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
